name: @cairnkeep/cli
description: A durable, harness-agnostic memory + context layer for coding agents (Claude Code, OpenCode).

scripts.build:server: npm --prefix mcp-memory-server ci --include=dev --global=false --dry-run=false && npm --prefix mcp-memory-server run build --global=false --dry-run=false
scripts.prepack: npm run build:server && npm run fix:perms
scripts.test: for test in scripts/test-*.sh; do "$test" || exit 1; done
scripts.check:public: scripts/verify-no-private-references.sh && scripts/verify-docs-parity.sh && npm run build:server && npm test
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:public && npm --prefix mcp-memory-server test --global=false --dry-run=false
